title: Implement DutyCycleTracker logic in hal.c matching ccp13.json vectors
description: Implement prune, total_tx, remaining, usage, can_transmit with fixed N=32 array, static funcs, prorate boundary, independent of test. Verify math matches Rust total_tx_in_window and evict_stale.
notes: Commit: 9e02ddec5 - updated prune/total_tx to use defines, renamed for Rust parity, fixed default permille and window calc for prorate boundary match. Tests verified via vector match.
